summary: AgentForge v4.0 MASSIVE UPDATE testing complete. All 8 new boss-level features tested: (1) Project Autopsy, (2) Build Farm, (3) Idea Engine, (4) One-Click SaaS Builder, (5) System Visualization backend, (6) Self-Debugging Loop, (7) Time Machine, (8) Self-Expanding Agents. Backend: 26/26 tests passed. Frontend: All 7 Command Center sub-tabs render correctly with proper data-testid attributes and action buttons.
passed_tests: ✅ API version is 4.0.0 with 33 features total
✅ POST /api/autopsy/analyze - runs project analysis, returns tech_stack, design_patterns, weak_points, upgrade_plan, stats
✅ GET /api/autopsy/{project_id} - returns autopsy results
✅ GET /api/autopsy/{project_id}/report - returns formatted report
✅ POST /api/debug-loop/{project_id}/start - starts debug loop, returns iterations
✅ GET /api/debug-loop/{project_id} - lists debug loops
✅ GET /api/debug-loop/{project_id}/latest - returns latest loop
✅ POST /api/checkpoints/{project_id}/create - creates checkpoint with files_snapshot
✅ GET /api/checkpoints/{project_id} - lists checkpoints
✅ POST /api/checkpoints/{checkpoint_id}/restore - restores checkpoint
✅ DELETE /api/checkpoints/{checkpoint_id} - deletes checkpoint
✅ POST /api/ideas/generate - generates ideas with title, description, unique_features, tech_stack_suggestion, complexity
✅ GET /api/ideas/batches - lists idea batches
✅ GET /api/ideas/batch/{batch_id} - gets specific batch with ideas
✅ POST /api/saas/generate - generates SaaS blueprint with backend_api, database_schema, auth_system, frontend_ui, payment_integration
✅ GET /api/saas/blueprints - lists blueprints
✅ GET /api/saas/blueprint/{blueprint_id} - gets specific blueprint
✅ GET /api/build-farm/workers - returns 3 default workers (BUILDER-ALPHA, BUILDER-BETA, BUILDER-GAMMA)
✅ GET /api/build-farm/status - returns worker count, active, queued, completed stats
✅ POST /api/build-farm/jobs/add - adds job to farm queue
✅ GET /api/build-farm/jobs - lists jobs
✅ GET /api/dynamic-agents - lists dynamic agents
✅ POST /api/dynamic-agents/spawn - spawns new agent with name, specialty, capabilities
✅ POST /api/dynamic-agents/auto-spawn - auto-spawns agents based on project
✅ DELETE /api/dynamic-agents/{agent_id} - deactivates agent
✅ GET /api/system-map/{project_id} - returns 200 (backend ready for visualization)
✅ Frontend: Command tab renders CommandCenter with data-testid='command-center'
✅ Frontend: All 7 sub-tabs present: Autopsy, Debug Loop, Time Machine, Ideas, SaaS Builder, Build Farm, Agents+
✅ Frontend: AutopsyPanel renders with 'Analyze Project' button (data-testid='run-autopsy-btn')
✅ Frontend: DebugLoopPanel renders with 'Start Debug Loop' button (data-testid='start-debug-btn')
✅ Frontend: TimeMachinePanel renders with 'Save Checkpoint' button (data-testid='create-checkpoint-btn')
✅ Frontend: IdeaEnginePanel renders with prompt input and 'Generate Ideas' button
✅ Frontend: SaaSBuilderPanel renders with 'New SaaS' button (data-testid='new-saas-btn')
✅ Frontend: BuildFarmPanel renders with 'Add to Farm' button and Workers section
✅ Frontend: DynamicAgentsPanel renders with 'Spawn Agent' and 'Auto-Detect' buttons
seed_data_creation: Test checkpoints, SaaS blueprints, idea batches, dynamic agents created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: AgentForge v4.0 features fully tested. 8 new boss-level features confirmed working: Project Autopsy (pattern-based), Debug Loop (simulated), Time Machine (checkpoints), Idea Engine (AI-generated), SaaS Builder (blueprints), Build Farm (3 workers - BUILDER-ALPHA/BETA/GAMMA), System Visualization (backend ready, frontend pending), Dynamic Agents (spawn/auto-spawn). Key endpoints all return expected data structures.
